name: Caramel Bubble Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and cinnamon; set aside.
2. Combine the caramel topping and maple syrup; set aside.
3. Sprinkle half the pecans in a greased 10-inch fluted tube pan.
4. Drizzle with a third of the caramel mixture.
5. Open the tubes of breadstick dough (do not unroll).
6. Cut each into eight slices; dip in butter, then roll in cinnamon-sugar.
7. Place half in the pan; sprinkle with remaining pecans.
8. Drizzle with half of the caramel mixture.
9. Top with remaining dough.
10. Drizzle with remaining caramel mixture.
11. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Cool for 2 minutes.
13. Invert onto a serving platter; serve warm.
Yield: 12-16 servings.
